sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; export default function RosterPanel({ team, onClose }) { if (!team) return null; return (

{team.team_name}

League
{team.league}
Coaching Staff
{team.coach}

Active Roster ({team.roster_count})

{(team.athletes || []).map((playerObj, idx) => (
{idx + 1} {playerObj.name}
[{playerObj.position || '—'}]
{playerObj.summary}
))}
); }
